title: begonia colliculata
intro: Begonia colliculata, also known as the 'Begonia with white flowers', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Begonia family. It is primarily found in Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as Malaysia and the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Begonia colliculata is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
